Create Calendar Table

Source: R/methods.R
create_calendar.Rd

create_calendar() summarizes a tibble to target time unit and completes the calendar to ensure no missing days, month, quarter or years. If a grouped tibble is passed through it will complete the calendar for each combination of the group

Arguments

x

ti object

Value

dbi object

Details

This is in internal function to make it easier to ensure data has no missing dates to simplify the use of time intelligence functions downstream of the application. If you want to summarize to a particular group, simply pass the tibble through to the dplyr::group_by() argument prior to function and the function will make summarize and make a complete calendar for each group item.
